Slice cucumbers and place into quart containers
In a sauce pot, heat up water and sushi vinegar together until boiling.
Once boiling, remove from heat and pour over cucumber slices.
Allow to cool to room temperature.
Remove cucumber pickles from brine and pulse-blend in a robot coup until a rough small chop is achieved
Reserve for use in the Herb Aioli
